label: Physical World Pak
blurb: Operations, Real Estate & Supply Chain. Margin protection and logistics optimization.

skills.label: Dispatch Route Optimizer
skills.method: Calculates the fastest daily routes for 10 HVAC vans based on live traffic and job priority.
trigger_examples: saves thousands in gas and maximizes billable calls

skills.label: Inventory Sku Matcher
skills.method: Normalizes messy vendor SKUs (e.g., "Blk Shirt" vs "Shirt-Black") into the master ERP system.

skills.label: Tenant Maintenance Triage
skills.method: Classifies tenant portal complaints ("pipe burst" \= P0, "paint chipped" \= P3), routes to correct vendor.

skills.label: Bill Of Lading Digitizer
skills.method: OCRs crumpled, handwritten warehouse dock receipts and injects the data into the WMS.
trigger_examples: bridges the gap between analog trucking and digital tracking

skills.label: Freight Bill Auditor
skills.method: Compares actual FedEx/UPS invoices against the negotiated corporate rate card.
trigger_examples: automatically catches and disputes carrier overcharges

skills.label: Hoa Violation Drafter
skills.method: Takes a photo of an overgrown lawn, matches it to the bylaws, drafts a compliant warning letter.

skills.label: Lease Agreement Extractor
skills.method: Pulls base rent, escalations, and CAM charges from 50-page commercial leases into a database.
trigger_examples: turns weeks of paralegal reading into seconds

skills.label: Customs Declaration Generator
skills.method: Automatically classifies products into exact Harmonized System (HS) tariff codes for international shipping.

skills.label: Zoning Code Analyzer
skills.method: Scrapes municipal PDFs to verify if a parcel of land allows for commercial/industrial use.
